scene: لقطة استوديو داكنة درامية للمنتج الحقيقي — المنتج هو البطل، إضاءة موجّهة، خلفية داكنة نظيفة — باشميل · A studio setting with a dark, clean background to emphasize the product. The cup is placed on a traditional heritage sadu weave or tribal carpet surface, subtly visible at the base to suggest a Najdi home environment. · The primary subject is a single-serve kraft cup of creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge, topped with a glossy roasted-red-pepper and chili-tomato relish. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests beside the porridge surface, serving as a garnish. · props: The cream-and-gold eight-point-star lid is positioned nearby, slightly out of focus, to imply the product's packaging. A gentle wisp of steam rises from the porridge, adding warmth and indicating freshness. · composition: The cup is centered in the frame, occupying the lower third. The camera is angled slightly above, capturing the porridge's texture and the glossy relish. The steam is visible against the dark background, enhancing the product's warmth and freshness. The star lid is placed to the side, partially visible to hint at the packaging without drawing focus away from the porridge. · light: A warm, directional key light simulates golden/tungsten lighting, highlighting the glossy rivulets of oil on the porridge and the shine of the chili pepper. Soft-edged shadows create depth and a natural, inviting atmosphere. · mood: The mood is warm and celebratory, emphasizing the product as a hero. The setting conveys a sense of tradition and authenticity, with the steam and lighting adding an intimate, freshly-served feel.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, composition open]
The reference image teaches the باشميل brand identity. Identity is invariant — camera angle, framing, and lighting are creative decisions, not copies of the reference photo.
Identity DNA — preserved at any angle: A baked layered pasta comfort dish — penne or macaroni bound in a creamy golden béchamel over a savory spiced minced-meat layer, baked until the top sets into a burnished golden crust, then portioned into the brand's kraft cup or aluminum-foil tray for delivery.
INTEGRATION: The same studio light defines backdrop and product. The product picks up subtle ambient cast at its edges; its contact shadow flows onto the backdrop with the same direction and softness as any shadow in the frame.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: Warm, intimate, appetite-first food photography with a documentary-Najdi-home feel: a single warm directional key (golden/tungsten), shallow depth-of-field isolating the dish, visible steam, glistening samn/oil pooling on the porridge surface, real plated heat — staged on authentic heritage surfaces (sadu weave, tribal carpet, palm-frond mat, clay finjan). Soft-edged shadows, not hard studio editorial; the 'just-served at the family table' character, never sterile pack-shot. — default clean_studio for catalog. Reads as captured on a medium-format digital back, high-end commercial grade. Material truth: true cooked-grain substrate — cracked wheat or rice, honest moist matte surface with a soft mounded form, real steam where hot; served in ceramic or a foil tray with its own true finish; NEVER a fried crust, never plastic-uniform; product-truth texture: Creamy and soft inside under a set golden-baked top; tender pasta in rich sauce. Imperfections are part of realism — genuine micro-reflectance, honest shadow-to-highlight temperature shift, true material behavior. Sharpness reads mechanical-optical, never algorithmically over-sharpened. No CGI-clean perfection, no plastic uniformity.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
a single-serve bowl/cup ≈9–11cm, or a family foil tray ≈22–26cm; scale-anchored to a serving spoon beside it — honest portion scale. As the sole catalog subject the product fills the frame at honest packaging scale — never distorted larger for emphasis.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Catalog hero proximity. Product occupies ~55% of frame height at a strong compositional point with deliberate negative space. Reads as a flagship catalog cover — confident, uncluttered.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived]
Clean editorial palette anchored to Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. against a Warm, dark-leaning heritage ground — deep saturated heritage textile (red tribal/Persian carpet or Najdi sadu weave) under warm low-key directional light, OR a clean warm cream studio sweep for CTA/packaging beauty shots. Never cool, never pure-white clinical, never daylight-flat. Shadows are warm and present (chiaroscuro), not lifted. backdrop. No colors foreign to the brand, no clinical pure white unless the brand owns it, no competing accents. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

[LIGHT & LENS · dimensional, mood not spec]
Premium catalog lighting — controlled, dimensional. Model chooses key direction, light quality (soft to semi-hard), fill ratio, and rim. Reveal the product's material truth and let Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. read cleanly. Cleaner than the dramatic chains — the catalog needs full legibility — but never flat. Lens: model chooses macro intimacy to natural product perspective; depth from full-sharp to gentle falloff.

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): لقطة استوديو داكنة درامية للمنتج الحقيقي — المنتج هو البطل، إضاءة موجّهة، خلفية داكنة نظيفة — باشميل · A studio setting with a dark, clean background to emphasize the product. The cup is placed on a traditional heritage sadu weave or tribal carpet surface, subtly visible at the base to suggest a Najdi home environment. · The primary subject is a single-serve kraft cup of creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge, topped with a glossy roasted-red-pepper and chili-tomato relish. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests beside the porridge surface, serving as a garnish. · props: The cream-and-gold eight-point-star lid is positioned nearby, slightly out of focus, to imply the product's packaging. A gentle wisp of steam rises from the porridge, adding warmth and indicating freshness. · composition: The cup is centered in the frame, occupying the lower third. The camera is angled slightly above, capturing the porridge's texture and the glossy relish. The steam is visible against the dark background, enhancing the product's warmth and freshness. The star lid is placed to the side, partially visible to hint at the packaging without drawing focus away from the porridge. · light: A warm, directional key light simulates golden/tungsten lighting, highlighting the glossy rivulets of oil on the porridge and the shine of the chili pepper. Soft-edged shadows create depth and a natural, inviting atmosphere. · mood: The mood is warm and celebratory, emphasizing the product as a hero. The setting conveys a sense of tradition and authenticity, with the steam and lighting adding an intimate, freshly-served feel.
Present the product as the absolute hero of a clean premium frame — flagship catalog energy. Model chooses: camera angle (low-three-quarter, eye-level front, high-angle three-quarter, near-profile); placement (centered with negative space, rule-of-thirds, low-anchored); backdrop treatment (flat seamless, gradient falloff, subtle backlit glow) — all within the Warm, dark-leaning heritage ground — deep saturated heritage textile (red tribal/Persian carpet or Najdi sadu weave) under warm low-key directional light, OR a clean warm cream studio sweep for CTA/packaging beauty shots. Never cool, never pure-white clinical, never daylight-flat. Shadows are warm and present (chiaroscuro), not lifted. range.

[SUBJECT]
Single product as absolute subject, rendered to printed-catalog fidelity. No secondary elements.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product only, never duplicated, mirrored, or composited. No human elements — no hands, faces, limbs, silhouettes. Clean unbroken backdrop, no props. Colors true without oversaturation. No cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal commercial product photography. Editorial grade anchored to Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy.. No overlay text, no watermark, no logo other than the product's own. No human presence. No borders, frames, or UI.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional, agent appends if context matches]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian — for catalog, adaptation is usually minimal. warmer gold/sand/amber tones may warm the backdrop toward gold/sand/amber for fragrance/oud/luxury sectors. For Premium+ subtle gold particle haze in the upper third.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Across generations, vary camera angle, placement, light direction, backdrop treatment, depth of field. Hold constant: brand-derived palette, clean catalog legibility, material texture. Each render a fresh catalog interpretation, never a fixed canonical shot.
